title: montia fontana subsp. verna
intro: Montia fontana subsp. verna, also known as spring purslane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of spring purslane include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and boosting the immune system, while also being rich in antioxidants and vitamins. The herbal preparations of spring purslane can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations.
